does: install BananaHub Skill when the host agent supports the listed install command
create or update BananaHub provider profiles in the local BananaHub config
collect or route API-key entry according to user choice, then persist it in the local BananaHub config
install missing Python runtime packages reported by config doctor after user consent
validate provider-backed, host-native, or prompt-only runtime mode
does_not: upgrade Cloudflare Worker, KV, API, CLI, template repositories, or other BananaHub components
update an existing BananaHub installation beyond what the selected host install command normally does
run paid image generation without explicit user consent
scope.existing_install_policy: If BananaHub Skill is already installed, diagnose first and preserve any valid provider/profile/model configuration. Do not reinstall or upgrade unrelated components unless the user explicitly asks for that operation.
scope.component_update_policy: Treat SQL/database changes, service upgrades, CLI upgrades, template repository updates, and platform deployment changes as separate maintenance tasks outside this initialization contract.

agent_contract.interactive_command_policy: Agents must not assume they can run TTY prompts. init --wizard is a human-terminal fallback, not the default agent path.
agent_contract.first_human_question: Which image channel do you already have?
agent_contract.env_default_behavior: Environment variables fill missing profile fields by default and override persisted profile fields only when BANANAHUB_ENV_OVERRIDE=1 is set.

config_profile_contract.selection: Use default_profile unless BANANAHUB_PROFILE or --profile selects another profile.
precedence: environment variables as fallback values for fields missing from the selected profile
config_profile_contract.environment_override: Set BANANAHUB_ENV_OVERRIDE=1 only for deliberate temporary environment overrides.

flow.rule: Ask only for provider-required fields. If the user chooses direct agent entry or already pasted values, persist the API key with config quickset --api-key-stdin. If the user does not want secrets in chat, provide the matching quickset command with placeholders for the user's local terminal.
Only ask the human to run this in a real terminal; do not use it as the agent automation path.

providers.label: OpenAI-compatible gateway
providers.quickset_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider openai-compatible --profile gpt --default-profile --base-url "<openai-compatible base url>" --api-key "<api key>" --model gpt-image-2
providers.quickset_stdin_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider openai-compatible --profile gpt --default-profile --base-url "<openai-compatible base url>" --api-key-stdin --model gpt-image-2

providers.label: OpenAI official GPT Image API
providers.quickset_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider openai --profile gpt --default-profile --api-key "<openai api key>" --model gpt-image-2
providers.quickset_stdin_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider openai --profile gpt --default-profile --api-key-stdin --model gpt-image-2

providers.label: Google AI Studio / Gemini
providers.quickset_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider google-ai-studio --profile nano --default-profile --api-key "<google api key>" --model gemini-3-pro-image-preview
providers.quickset_stdin_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider google-ai-studio --profile nano --default-profile --api-key-stdin --model gemini-3-pro-image-preview

providers.label: Gemini-compatible gateway
providers.quickset_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider gemini-compatible --profile nano --default-profile --base-url "<gemini-compatible base url>" --api-key "<api key>" --model gemini-3-pro-image-preview
providers.quickset_stdin_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider gemini-compatible --profile nano --default-profile --base-url "<gemini-compatible base url>" --api-key-stdin --model gemini-3-pro-image-preview

providers.label: Vertex AI
providers.quickset_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider vertex-ai --profile vertex --default-profile --auth-mode adc --project "<gcp-project>" --location global

providers.label: ChatGPT-compatible image endpoint
providers.quickset_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider chatgpt-compatible --profile chat --default-profile --base-url "<chat endpoint>" --api-key "<api key>" --model gpt-5.4
providers.quickset_stdin_command: python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py config quickset --provider chatgpt-compatible --profile chat --default-profile --base-url "<chat endpoint>" --api-key-stdin --model gpt-5.4

diagnosis_contract.env_shadowed_config_sources_policy: treat_as informational; these env vars were ignored because the selected persisted profile already defines that field

gpt_image_2_generation.command: BANANAHUB_PROFILE=gpt python3 {baseDir}/scripts/bananahub.py generate "Create a cute sticker of a tiny cheerful robot holding a banana, rounded kawaii vector style, thick clean outlines, soft pastel colors, plain white background, no text." --model gpt-image-2 --aspect 1:1 --no-fallback --output /tmp/bananahub-gpt-image-2-smoke-test.png

handoff_usage.instruction: Read https://bananahub.ai/agent-init.json and initialize BananaHub according to it.
